editorsPicks.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
editorsPicks.summary: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter with Mad Max.
editorsPicks.summaryEn: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter with Mad Max.
editorsPicks.reason: 视觉震撼的后末日史诗，Anya Taylor-Joy 演绎的 Furiosa 令人难忘
editorsPicks.reasonEn: Visually stunning post-apocalyptic epic with Anya Taylor-Joy's unforgettable Furiosa

editorsPicks.title: Dune: Part Two
editorsPicks.summary: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to seek revenge against those who destroyed his family.
editorsPicks.summaryEn: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to seek revenge against those who destroyed his family.
editorsPicks.reason: Denis Villeneuve 的史诗续作，视觉与叙事双重巅峰
editorsPicks.reasonEn: Denis Villeneuve's epic sequel reaches new heights in both visuals and storytelling

editorsPicks.title: The Holdovers
editorsPicks.summary: A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break.
editorsPicks.summaryEn: A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break.
editorsPicks.reason: 温暖的圣诞电影，Paul Giamatti 的表演是最大亮点
editorsPicks.reasonEn: A warm Christmas film with Paul Giamatti's standout performance

hiddenGems.title: Monster
hiddenGems.summary: A mother demands answers from a teacher when her son begins acting strangely.
hiddenGems.summaryEn: A mother demands answers from a teacher when her son begins acting strangely.
hiddenGems.reason: 是枝裕和的视角游戏，每个角度都揭示新的真相
hiddenGems.reasonEn: Hirokazu Kore-eda's perspective game where each angle reveals new truth

hiddenGems.title: Perfect Days
hiddenGems.summary: A janitor in Tokyo drives between jobs listening to rock music.
hiddenGems.summaryEn: A janitor in Tokyo drives between jobs listening to rock music.
hiddenGems.reason: 关于日常之美，Wim Wenders 最温柔的电影
hiddenGems.reasonEn: About the beauty of everyday life, Wenders' most tender film

comingSoon.title: Mickey 17
comingSoon.summary: An expendable employee is sent to colonize an ice world.
comingSoon.summaryEn: An expendable employee is sent to colonize an ice world.

trending.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
trending.titleEn: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes

brief: 2026年7月3日全球娱乐情报汇总。本周多部大片上映，独立电影领域也有惊喜。
